paper_focus.title: Extreme high accuracy prediction and design of Fe-C-Cr-Mn-Si steel using machine learning
paper_focus.research_objective: To develop an alternate approach combining machine learning, firefly optimization, and CGANs to rapidly and accurately predict the solid solution strengthening theory and microhardness of Fe-C-Cr-Mn-Si steel, overcoming the limitations of time-consuming and costly experimental determination.
main_process_variables: Chemical composition (C, Si, Mn, Cr, S, Ni, P, Fe, Mo, V, W mass percentages)
Modified solid solution strengthening theory (difference in cohesive energy, local cohesive energy mismatch, shear modulus)
expected_information_axis: mechanism (solid solution strengthening, cohesive energy, shear modulus)
